meanings.definition: continue talking or writing in a desultory manner
examples: This novel rambles on and jogs

meanings.definition: move about aimlessly or without any destination, often in search of food or employment
examples: The cattle roam across the prairie
the laborers drift from one town to the next
They rolled from town to town

meanings.definition: (of e.g. speech and writing) tending to depart from the main point or cover a wide range of subjects
examples: amusingly digressive with satirical thrusts at women's fashions among other things
a rambling speech about this and that
the river followed its wandering course
